name: DEPC-Treated Water

notes.en: Use for RNA work only. Do NOT add DEPC to Tris buffers (reacts with amine groups). Modern alternative: commercial nuclease-free water.
notes.zh: 用于 RNA 实验。不要加 DEPC 到 Tris 缓冲液（与氨基反应）。替代品：商品化无核酸酶水。

ref: CSH Protocols doi:10.1101/pdb.rec8135; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

storage.notes: Autoclave after DEPC treatment to inactivate residues

usage.en: DEPC-treated RNase-free water for RNA work and RNase-sensitive experiments.
usage.zh: DEPC 处理的无 RNase 水，用于 RNA 实验和对 RNase 敏感的操作。
